welcome_message:
Welcome to the multi-environment ucm template.

This template scaffolds a ucm.yml with dev, staging and prod targets that share a common resource definition via an include file.

project_name.pattern_match_failure_message: Name must consist of letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.
project_name.description:
Unique name for this ucm project.
project_name

catalog_prefix.description:
Catalog prefix. Each target gets '<prefix>_<target>' (e.g. team_alpha_prod).
catalog_prefix

principal.description:
Group or service principal receiving read access in every target.
principal

success_message:
Your new multi-environment ucm project has been created in the '{{.project_name}}' directory.

Next steps:
  cd {{.project_name}}
  databricks ucm validate --target dev
  databricks ucm plan --target staging
  databricks ucm deploy --target prod
